prompt:
Use case: background-extraction
Asset type: rear-depth mountain cutout for scene 2 of a 16:9 Chinese paper-collage animation
Input images: Image 1 is the approved style sample and defines the mineral celadon mountains and paper relief
Primary request: three overlapping distant mountain-ridge silhouettes and a few pale cloud-paper strips, spanning the upper half while leaving open sky gaps
Style/medium: premium handcrafted Chinese paper collage, mulberry fibers, restrained ink, muted celadon and gray-blue
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background
Constraints: uniform key color only; no background shadow or gradient; no #ff00ff in artwork; no people, buildings, text, watermark or logo; complete cutout
Avoid: photoreal mountains, dense city, glossy 3D
